enriched_points.expanded_content: Direct measurement techniques, including gas exchange and biomass analysis, effectively quantify CO₂ uptake, offering insights into algal photosynthetic efficiency and overall carbon assimilation.
Analytical methods such as chlorophyll a fluorescence and carbon isotope analysis are employed to assess algal health and verify the accuracy of carbon capture measurements.
Data analysis involves statistical modeling and comparative assessments, enabling researchers to interpret carbon uptake results and evaluate the effectiveness of algal systems for carbon capture.
